Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Ensures the output reflects real inventory reality, not just catalog listings, so Mark can act on the report immediately.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Organizes the catalog matches and inventory gaps into a structured, clearly formatted Excel-ready layout with stocked and missing parts clearly separated.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Eliminates the manual work of formatting and cross-referencing data, producing a clean, professional output Mark can share with customers directly.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel file as an attachment along with a brief summary of what was found and what gaps exist for the requested vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the full catalog report to Mark's inbox minutes after form submission, replacing what was previously a manual research task.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory data for every part on the weekly backorder report, returning on-hand quantities, on-order status, and in-transit shipment details for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving hours of duplicated effort every week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the existing backorder report structure, enriching each row and flagging any parts with no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source as dead-end items.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into an actionable, fully enriched status report that immediately highlights which parts need escalation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Sends draft customer communication emails for each flagged backorder, pre-populated with the part status, estimated resolution, and next steps based on inventory data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team ready-to-send customer updates in minutes, dramatically reducing response lag and improving customer trust during backorder situations.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor listings by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive market reference in one pass that would take days to compile manually across three separate vendor sites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify which vehicles DFC already covers and which represent gaps or opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Pinpoints exactly where DFC has coverage and where it doesn't, giving Dino a clear picture of the competitive landscape and expansion opportunities.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to relevant customers asking them to confirm interest or demand for specific two-piece rotor fitments not currently in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signals from the market without requiring manual outreach, turning the catalog builder into a live demand validation tool.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted output sheet ready for Dino's review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers one clean, organized reference document that consolidates weeks of research and outreach into an immediately usable strategic asset.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active ad copy across Meta and TikTok ad accounts, extracting headline, body, and description fields from every live creative.
Meta Investigation.impact: Gives instant, complete visibility into every word currently running in paid ads without manually clicking through each campaign.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all extracted ad copy for the specified target phrases and flags every exact match, noting the ad ID, field name, and verbatim copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a flagged phrase across thousands of ad variations in seconds, with zero risk of human oversight.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured flagged report listing every ad where a match was found, organized by platform, with the exact field and copy text for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an audit-ready, actionable report on demand, enabling fast compliance review or copy correction without a lengthy manual investigation.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the candidate's email, name, and any attached resume PDF for processing.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures every inbound application is captured and acted on immediately, eliminating the risk of candidates falling through the cracks in a busy shared inbox.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured Drive folder organized by role and date, creating a permanent, searchable file record for every applicant.
Resume Bot.impact: Keeps all candidate files organized and accessible without manual filing, making it easy to retrieve any resume at any point in the hiring process.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of open roles, categorizes the candidate as approved, denied, or pending based on role status, and drafts the appropriate auto-reply message.
Resume Bot.impact: Replaces hours of manual resume screening with consistent, criteria-based evaluations delivered instantly, freeing recruiters to focus only on top candidates.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant decision, score, role match, and Drive file link to a structured dashboard, with pending candidates automatically routed to a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a living, organized hiring record that gives the team instant visibility into pipeline status and ensures paused-role candidates are never lost or forgotten.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is moving along strong — we currently have 56 total agents across the portfolio, with 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While it was a quieter week on the movement front, our completed agents continue running and delivering value daily across email marketing, creator outreach, paid media, support ticketing, and more. The team has built an impressive foundation, and with 18 planned agents still in the queue, there's plenty of exciting work ahead!
